items.summary: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising, decorating and creator-based opportunities.

items.title: Why the rise of open source AI isn't hurting Anthropic ... yet
items.summary: Open source models' success isn't coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.

items.title: South Korea's $880 billion chip and AI plan faces big power and water challenges - a single megacluster requires a quarter of Seoul's total power demand
items.summary: The ₩1,350 trillion total combines a $520 billion semiconductor program with AI data center and robotics spending, mostly made up of corporate capex.

items.title: Can I Set the Maximum Distance the Beacon Transmits?
items.summary: Many people inquire about adjusting the transmission distance of a beacon. They often wish to either conserve battery or restrict the range at which a beacon is detectable. While some third-party platforms and SDKs offer distance settings,...
